title: Senior Software Engineer - CGI India Capital India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - CGI India Capital India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? CGI India Capital India in Pune offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CGI India Capital India:
CGI India Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CGI India Capital India!
